Define the security privilege used in gu: Define the security privilege used in guards, buttons, and navigation.
Hint Privilege Arabic Name: Enter the Arabic privilege name exactly as it should appear inside the system.
Hint Privilege Code: Use a unique uppercase English code with underscores for guards, policies, and navigation rules.
Hint Privilege English Name: Enter a clear English privilege name for English-facing screens and reports.
Hint Privilege Order: Set the display order starting from 0 or higher.
Manage privilege records used across rou: Manage privilege records used across routes, actions, and security policies.
Name: Name
Privilege Arabic name is required and mu: Privilege Arabic name is required and must be valid.
Privilege code is required and must be v: Privilege code is required and must be valid.
Privilege English name is required and m: Privilege English name is required and must be valid.
Privilege order is required and must be: Privilege order is required and must be zero or greater.
Privileges define what parts of the syst: Privileges define what parts of the system users can access.
Use uppercase letters, numbers, and unde: Use uppercase letters, numbers, and underscore only.
privileges.formPageSubtitle: Define the security privilege used in guards, buttons, and navigation.
privileges.formWorkflowNote: Arabic name, English name, code, and order are required for each privilege.
privileges.formWorkflowNoteBulk: Complete every row before saving — duplicate codes within the batch are rejected.
privileges.sectionIdentitySubtitle: Arabic and English names as they appear in the system.
privileges.sectionSecuritySubtitle: Unique guard code and display order in lists.
privileges.sectionBatchSubtitle: Add multiple privileges and create them in one submit.
privileges.hintBatch: Use Generate Code from the English name, or Duplicate to copy a similar row.
